description_long: This object is a single, whole Hass avocado with a dark green, pebbly skin and a classic pear-like shape. The surface is covered in small, slightly raised bumps and has a matte, slightly rough finish with a few minor blemishes and darker spots. The top of the avocado features a small, circular stem scar, while the bottom is more rounded and smooth. The coloration is predominantly a deep, rich green with subtle variations in hue and some lighter green speckles. The skin appears thick and firm, typical of an avocado that is not yet fully ripe. There are no visible cut marks, openings, or signs of interior exposure.
description: A whole, dark green Hass avocado with a bumpy, matte skin and a small stem scar at the top. The surface is slightly rough with minor blemishes and color variations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, rounded side of the avocado with a mostly uniform dark green color and subtle surface bumps.
description_view_1: This view highlights the slightly more tapered side, with visible texture and a few small, darker spots.
description_view_2: The top of the avocado is visible, showing the small, circular stem scar and a more pronounced pear shape.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the stem scar and the upper curvature, with more visible skin texture and color variation.
attribute_skin_blemishes: minor dark spots and small surface irregularities
